summary: For a breezy commute, keep one easy removable layer on the upper body.
body: If the weather is mild but the commute includes indoor and outdoor switching, a light removable layer helps keep the outfit stable.

dominant_factors: Wind and indoor-outdoor switching matter more than pure warmth.
occasion_adjustments: Keep the outer layer easy to carry after arrival.

summary: In light rain, prioritize shoes that stay dry easily.
body: When the day includes light rain and walking, closed shoes with easy-dry uppers are more practical than delicate styling.

shoes: Favor closed shoes that do not soak easily.
